49.text: Had not Grace from his Lord reached him, he would indeed have been cast off on the naked shore, in disgrace.

49.author: Transliteration
49.text: Lawla an tadarakahu niAAmatun min rabbihi lanubitha bialAAarai wahuwa mathmoomun

50.author: Ahmed Ali
50.text: Then his Lord chose him and placed him among the upright.

50.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
50.text: His Lord therefore chose him and made him among those deserving His proximity.

50.author: Arberry
50.text: But his Lord had chosen him, and He placed him among the righteous.

50.author: Daryabadi
50.text: Then his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

50.author: Hilali & Khan
50.text: But his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

50.author: Itani
50.text: But his Lord chose him, and made him one of the righteous.

50.author: Maududi
50.text: But his Lord exalted him, and included him among His righteous servants.

50.author: Mubarakpuri
50.text: Then his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

50.author: Pickthall
50.text: But his Lord chose him and placed him among the righteous.

50.author: Qarai
50.text: So his Lord chose him and made him one of the righteous.

50.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
50.text: But his Lord had chosen him and He placed him among the righteous.

50.author: Saheeh International
50.text: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

50.author: Sarwar
50.text: But his Lord chose him as His Prophet and made him one of the righteous ones.

50.author: Shakir
50.text: Then his Lord chose him, and He made him of the good.

50.author: Wahiduddin Khan
50.text: But his Lord chose him for His own and made him one of the righteous.

50.author: Yusuf Ali
50.text: Thus did his Lord choose him and make him of the Company of the Righteous.

51.author: Ahmed Ali
51.text: But the unbelievers would like to stare you out of balance when they hear the warning, and say: "Surely he is possessed;"

51.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
51.text: And indeed the disbelievers seem as if they would topple you with their evil gaze when they hear the Qur’an, and they say, “He is indeed insane.”

51.author: Arberry
51.text: The unbelievers wellnigh strike thee down with their glances, when they hear the Reminder, and they say, 'Surely he is a man possessed!'

51.author: Daryabadi
51.text: And those who disbelieve well-nigh cause thee to stumble with their looks when they hear the Admonition, and they say: verily he is mad.

51.author: Hilali & Khan
51.text: And verily, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes through hatredness when they hear the Reminder (the Quran), and they say: "Verily, he (Muhammad SAW) is a madman!"

51.author: Itani
51.text: Those who disbelieve almost stab you with their glances when they hear the message, and say, “He is crazy!”

51.author: Maududi
51.text: When the unbelievers hear this Exhortation, they look at you as though they would knock you off your feet with their (hostile) glances. They say: “Surely he is afflicted with madness”;

51.author: Mubarakpuri
51.text: And verily, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes (through hatred) when they hear the Reminder (the Qur'an), and they say: "Verily, he is a madman!"

51.author: Pickthall
51.text: And lo! those who disbelieve would fain disconcert thee with their eyes when they hear the Reminder, and they say: Lo! he is indeed mad;

51.author: Qarai
51.text: Indeed the faithless almost devour you with their eyes when they hear this Reminder, and they say, ‘He is indeed crazy.’

51.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
51.text: When the unbelievers hear the Reminder, they nearly strike you down with their glances, and say: 'Surely, he is mad'

51.author: Saheeh International
51.text: And indeed, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes when they hear the message, and they say, "Indeed, he is mad."

51.author: Sarwar
51.text: When the disbelievers listen to you reciting the Quran they almost try to destroy you with their piercing eyes. Then they say, "He is certainly insane".

51.author: Shakir
51.text: And those who disbelieve would almost smite you with their eyes when they hear the reminder, and they say: Most surely he is mad.

51.author: Wahiduddin Khan
51.text: When those who deny the truth hear the admonition, they would almost cause you to stumble with their evil eyes; and they say, "He is certainly mad."

51.author: Yusuf Ali
51.text: And the Unbelievers would almost trip thee up with their eyes when they hear the Message; and they say: "Surely he is possessed!"

51.author: Transliteration
51.text: Wain yakadu allatheena kafaroo layuzliqoonaka biabsarihim lamma samiAAoo alththikra wayaqooloona innahu lamajnoonun

52.author: Ahmed Ali
52.text: Whilst it is no more than reminder for the people of the world.

52.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
52.text: Whereas it is not but an advice to the entire creation!

52.author: Arberry
52.text: And it is nothing but a Reminder unto all beings.

52.author: Daryabadi
52.text: While it is naught but an admonition Unto the worlds.

52.author: Hilali & Khan
52.text: But it is nothing else than a Reminder to all the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists).

52.author: Itani
52.text: But it is no less than a reminder to all the Worlds.

52.author: Maududi
52.text: although this is nothing but an Exhortation (to goodness) for everyone in the world.

52.author: Mubarakpuri
52.text: But it is nothing else than a Reminder to all the creatures (`Alamin).

52.author: Pickthall
52.text: When it is naught else than a Reminder to creation.

52.author: Qarai
52.text: Yet it is just a reminder for all the nations.

52.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
52.text: But it is nothing other than a Reminder for all the worlds.

52.author: Saheeh International
52.text: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.

52.author: Sarwar
52.text: The Quran is nothing but a reminder from God to mankind.

52.author: Shakir
52.text: And it is naught but a reminder to the nations.

52.author: Wahiduddin Khan
52.text: Yet it is purely an admonition to mankind.

52.author: Yusuf Ali
52.text: But it is nothing less than a Message to all the worlds.
